CustomerScenario.description: Customer scenario. A definition of a customer who is contacting a customer service representative. This includes a general description of the customer, and information about the specific situation the customer is in and the tasks they are trying to complete.

customer_persona.description: Customer's persona. This information defines the customer in general, not the specific situation they are in.
customer_persona.title: Customer Persona

reason_for_contact.description: The reason for the customer to contact the customer service representative.
reason_for_contact.title: Reason For Contact

customer_details.description: Specific details about the customer that are relevant to the customer's tasks. This should be information that the customer can provide to the representative when the representative asks for details about the customer's tasks.
customer_details.title: Customer Details

task_instructions.description: Instructions for the customer about the specific situation the customer is in, the tasks they are trying to complete, and how to interact with the customer service representative.
task_instructions.title: Task Instructions

CustomerScenario.title: CustomerScenario

description: Customer scenario collection. A collection of customer scenarios.

scenarios.description: An array that contains the customer scenarios in the collection.
scenarios.title: Scenarios

title: CustomerScenarioCollection
